title: Optimism DEX - Open App
meta_description: optimism dex swaps on OP Mainnet route to the official Uniswap app for wallet connection, quote review, and onchain execution.
hero_h2: Swap tokens on OP Mainnet through Uniswap
hero_lead: optimism dex gives wallet users a direct route to OP Mainnet token swaps in the official Uniswap app, where they can connect, compare the quote, and sign from their own wallet.
what_is: Uniswap is a decentralized exchange interface and protocol suite; its developer docs list Optimism chain ID 10 among supported deployment networks. This page is an independent, app-first route for users who want the OP Mainnet swap screen without relying on search results.

how.d: Use the primary action to open app.uniswap.org and verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
Select OP Mainnet in the interface or wallet, then confirm the chain before any approval or swap.
Pick the input and output assets, review the quoted route, and avoid unknown tokens unless you have verified the contract.
Check price impact, minimum received, slippage, approvals, and gas, then sign only if the wallet details match the app.

points.p: The page sends swap intent to Uniswap's official web app instead of holding funds, asking for seed phrases, or creating an account.
OP Mainnet is part of the Optimism ecosystem; use Optimism documentation when you need chain-level reference material.
Quotes, liquidity, gas, and slippage can change before execution, so the final wallet confirmation is the source of truth.

faq.a: It is an independent landing route for users looking to swap tokens on OP Mainnet through the official Uniswap app.

faq.q: Is optimism dex the official Optimism app?
faq.a: No. This page is not operated by Optimism or Uniswap; it routes users to app.uniswap.org for the actual swap flow.

faq.q: Which network should optimism dex use?
faq.a: Use OP Mainnet, also known as Optimism chain ID 10, and verify the selected network in both the app and wallet before signing.

faq.q: Does optimism dex custody my tokens?
faq.a: No. The landing page does not custody assets; swaps are initiated in Uniswap and require wallet approval and transaction signatures.

faq.q: Can optimism dex guarantee the best swap rate?
faq.a: No. Rates depend on live liquidity, routing, gas, slippage, and timing, so review the final quote inside the app before confirming.

footer_note: Independent page, not the official app; verify app.uniswap.org before connecting; educational only, not financial advice.
